title: cassinia aculeata var. uncata
intro: Cassinia aculeata var. uncata is a shrub plant native to Australia, belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cassinia aculeata var. uncata include treating various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
